case_title: MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. VS. SUMIKO KUSUMOTO et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT KUSUMOTO, SUMIKO KUSUMOTO, OSAJI DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-24-2012
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-02-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 02:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-02-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
